description_long: This is a medium-sized ceramic cup with a smooth, rounded body and a slightly flared rim. The upper portion of the cup is a clean, matte white, while the lower section features a contrasting brown band that wraps around the base. A single, circular handle is attached to one side, large enough for a comfortable grip. The cup's interior is also white, matching the exterior upper portion. The surface appears hard and non-porous, typical of glazed ceramic kitchenware. There are no visible logos, patterns, or decorative elements, giving it a minimalist and modern appearance.
description: A white ceramic cup with a brown base and a round handle, featuring a smooth, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cup's handle centered and the brown base visible at the bottom.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the circular handle on the left and the smooth transition between the white and brown sections.
description_view_2: Rear view with no handle visible, displaying the continuous white surface and brown base.
description_view_3: Angled view with the handle on the right, again showing the clean color separation and rounded form.
